activities_projects.title: Understanding Weather and Climate
steps: Read the definitions of weather and climate from the chapter
Write the meaning of weather in your own words
Write the meaning of climate in your own words
Give one example for each
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the difference between weather and climate

activities_projects.title: Elements of Weather Chart
activities_projects.objective: Identify elements that affect weather and climate
steps: Write 'Elements of Weather' as the title
List temperature, pressure, wind, humidity and precipitation
Write one line explaining each element
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the basic elements that influence weather
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of chart (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Climatic Controls List
steps: Read the section on climatic controls
List the six controls of climate
Write a short description for each
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students identify factors affecting climate such as latitude and altitude

activities_projects.title: Seasons of India Diagram
activities_projects.objective: Learn about the main seasons of India
steps: Draw a simple diagram showing four seasons
Label winter, summer, advancing monsoon and retreating monsoon
Write the months associated with each season
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the seasonal pattern of India

activities_projects.title: Monsoon Meaning Activity
steps: Read the section explaining monsoon
Write the definition of monsoon
Explain what is meant by seasonal reversal of winds
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how monsoon winds change direction seasonally

activities_projects.title: Rainfall Observation Task
activities_projects.objective: Observe rainfall patterns in your region
steps: Find rainfall information for your area
Note the months with heavy rainfall
Write two reasons for rainfall during that season
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students relate local weather patterns to monsoon rainfall

activities_projects.title: Hot Weather Season Features
activities_projects.objective: Identify features of the summer season in India
steps: Read the section on hot weather season
List three features such as high temperature and loo winds
Explain any one feature briefly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand characteristics of summer climate

activities_projects.title: Winter Season Description
steps: Read about the winter season
Write the months of the cold weather season
Mention two characteristics of winter weather
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the climatic features of winter in India

activities_projects.title: Rainfall Map Study
steps: Observe the rainfall map in the textbook
Identify one region with very high rainfall
Identify one region with very low rainfall
Write the names of these places
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand regional variation in rainfall

activities_projects.title: Monsoon Importance Paragraph
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of monsoon in India
steps: Think about how monsoon affects agriculture and water supply
Write a short paragraph explaining its importance
Give one example related to farming
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recognize the role of monsoon in India's life and economy
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and relevance of explanation (10 marks)
